summary: Iteration 206: DOP Automatica + Etichetta CE EN 1090 - All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend UI verified: 'DOP Auto' and 'Etichetta CE' buttons visible ONLY for EN_1090 commesse, hidden for GENERICA. Button clicks trigger DOP creation and PDF downloads correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/dop-automatica creates DOP with auto-populated fields from riesame, material_batches, report_ispezioni, controllo_finale
DOP automatica has 'automatica: true' flag and includes riesame, ispezioni, controllo_finale sections
GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/dop-frazionata/{dop_id}/pdf generates PDF with _build_verifiche_html() for automatic DOPs (sections 4-6)
GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/etichetta-ce-1090/pdf generates compact 148x105mm CE label PDF
Frontend CommessaHubPage correctly shows DOP Auto and Etichetta CE buttons ONLY when c?.normativa_tipo === 'EN_1090'
handleDopAutomatica() creates DOP via POST then downloads PDF via downloadPdfBlob()
handleEtichettaCE1090() directly downloads CE label PDF

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements working, button visibility conditional, downloads working)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test commesse.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 206 verified the new DOP Automatica and Etichetta CE EN 1090 features. Key endpoints: POST /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/dop-automatica (creates auto-populated DOP), GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/dop-frazionata/{dop_id}/pdf (PDF with verification sections for auto DOPs), GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/etichetta-ce-1090/pdf (compact CE label). Frontend buttons 'DOP Auto' and 'Etichetta CE' are conditionally rendered only for EN_1090 commesse (line ~350-366 in CommessaHubPage.js). Test DOPs were cleaned up after testing.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/dop-au: PASS - Creates DOP with automatica=true, riesame, ispezioni, controllo_finale sections
backend_endpoints.GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/dop-fra: PASS - Returns valid PDF (30KB+) with verification sections
backend_endpoints.GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/etichet: PASS - Returns valid CE label PDF (18KB+) with 148x105mm format
backend_endpoints.GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/dop-fra: PASS - Lists all DOPs for commessa
backend_endpoints.GET /api/commesse/{cid}/hub: PASS - Returns normativa_tipo field for button visibility

EN_1090_commessa.btn-dop-automatica: VISIBLE - Indigo button with FileText icon
EN_1090_commessa.btn-etichetta-ce-1090: VISIBLE - Slate button with Award icon

DOP_Auto_click.action: Creates DOP via POST, then downloads PDF
DOP_Auto_click.toast: DoP automatica C-2026-0012/A creata — 0 lotti tracciati
